Container.Name: UNRAIDnotUnHealthy
Container.Overview: All-in-one Prometheus + Grafana monitoring for Unraid. Bundles node_exporter, cAdvisor, smartctl_exporter, NVIDIA GPU exporter, and IPMI exporter in a single container, supervised by s6-overlay. Pre-provisioned dashboards for system, disks/SMART, containers, GPU, and IPMI.
Container.Description:
One-stop monitoring for Unraid. Open the WebUI on port 3000, log in with admin/admin (you'll be prompted to change the password), and head to the UNRAIDnotUnHealthy folder for the bundled dashboards.
Required mounts are pre-configured below. The IPMI and NVIDIA exporters auto-detect their hardware — if absent, those exporters quietly idle and the matching dashboard panels show "no data" (harmless).
To enable NVIDIA GPU metrics, install the Nvidia-Driver plugin and add `--runtime=nvidia` plus `NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all` in Extra Parameters.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Grafana port

Config.Name: Prometheus TSDB
Config.Description: Time-series storage. Path defaults to an array-only share (appdb) since the TSDB grows with retention; pointing it at appdata (cache-only) risks filling the cache pool.

Config.Name: Grafana Data
Config.Description: Grafana DB (users, settings, custom dashboards). Defaults to appdb (array-only) so it never pressures the cache pool.

Config.Name: Host /
Config.Description: Host root for node_exporter filesystem stats.

Config.Name: Host /proc
Config.Description: Host /proc for node_exporter and cadvisor.

Config.Name: Host /sys
Config.Description: Host /sys for hwmon temps, cgroups.

Config.Name: Host /sys (canonical)
Config.Description: Required by cAdvisor to enumerate per-container cgroups. Distinct from the /host/sys mount used by node_exporter.

Config.Name: Docker State Dir
Config.Description: Read-only access to Docker's state dir so cAdvisor can join cgroup IDs to container names.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Read-only docker.sock for cAdvisor container metadata + Alloy log streams.

Config.Name: Host /dev
Config.Description: Required for SMART (smartctl) and IPMI (/dev/ipmi0) access.

Config.Name: Host /var/log
Config.Description: Read-only mount of host /var/log. Alloy tails syslog/messages/kern.log from here for the Logs dashboard.

Config.Name: Loki TSDB
Config.Description: Loki log storage. Defaults to /mnt/user/logs (array-backed) — logs grow with retention.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/Los_Angeles).

Config.Name: Prometheus Retention
Config.Description: Prometheus TSDB retention window (e.g. 30d, 90d, 1y).

Config.Name: Loki Retention
Config.Description: Loki log retention window. Logs use disk faster than metrics — bump only if you have headroom.

Config.Name: Grafana Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional: set the initial Grafana admin password (leave blank to use 'admin' and be prompted to change on first login).

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Host user ID for the in-container service user. Unraid convention: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Host group ID for the in-container service user. Unraid convention: 100 (users).

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Sonarr instance. Leave SONARR_API_KEY blank below to disable the exporter.

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: From Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key. Leave blank to disable the Sonarr exporter and dashboard panels.

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Radarr instance. Leave RADARR_API_KEY blank below to disable the exporter.

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: From Radarr → Settings → General → API Key. Leave blank to disable the Radarr exporter and dashboard panels.
